title: Resolve correction-tensor condition: H3: scalar trace leakage neutrality
description: Sector: H_curv / H_exch trace. Allowed condition: C_H = 0 outside, or future tensor structure proves trace-neutral non-metric behavior. Forbidden condition: phi_H = C_H/r with C_H != 0 treated as an exterior scalar mass correction. Consequence: Correction tensor trace leakage must not become a hidden scalar mass route..
